author: Divyansh Agrawal
name: Distill+IntraLoop SP1024 9x512
blurb: SP-1024 9-layer 512-dim model with GQA (4 KV heads), SwiGLU, tied embeddings, partial depth recurrence (layers 3-4 looped 2x for 11 effective layers), EMA self-distillation (start_frac=0.70, weight=0.08, temp=2.0), Muon optimizer, QK-Gain 5.0, SWA (282 snapshots), GPTQ int8+zstd quantization.
